notes:
Game brings up the unity window full screen and then flickers and forces itself into the foreground with a flickering/invisible window. With the flickering I was able to see, it didn't appear to be accepting any input to get past the initial screen.  
Desktop was completely unusable even on the second monitor. I couldn't switch apps or bring up the restart/shutdown menu.  
Best way I found to exit is changing TTY with ctrl+alt+f3 to access the terminal and reboot

(My previous report was for X11, this is for wayland, using KDE plasma 5.27.8)  
Game brings up the unity window full screen and then has a constant flicker. I was able to see the game despite the flickering, but it didn't seem to accept any input at least with the mouse.  
I was able to exit the app easily and use the rest of my desktop now that I tried it on wayland.
